suggestedRules: For Swedish municipal sites, /events and /kalender paths should have lower threshold (score >= 8)
Consider location of event links in nav vs content when scoring

candidateRuleForC0C3.appliesTo: Swedish municipal and cultural sites with event listings

suggestedRules: For newspaper sites, try /kultur, /nyheter, /sport as event paths
Add 404 detection to trigger fallback to root page discovery
